\tzpentry{ID4661}{Pi Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4661 introduces Pi Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$c_{eff}(r) = c_0 \\frac{K_0(r/r_{TZP})}{K_0(0^+)} \\approx c_0 \\sqrt{\\frac{\\pi r_{TZP}}{2r}} \\exp(-r/r_{TZP})", "latex_normalized": "$
\]
